summary: Issue #404 six-KPI Analytics dashboard: intent-review spec_fidelity=pass consumed as given. Demo-only mock fixtures with no auth/secrets; client-side state in demo-state; 8/8 P2-6 ACs mapped to vitest; analytics tests green. No CRITICAL reliability/security/observability/performance findings on mock Analytics surface.

mappings.criterion: Exactly six Main KPIs render as one hero plus five cards; Net Revenue and 30 days are defaults
mappings.test: apps/demo/src/__tests__/analytics-dashboard.test.tsx::AC1: renders one hero and five selector cards with Net Revenue at 30 days by default

mappings.criterion: Net Revenue, Inventory Turnover, and Fulfillment Accuracy Rate use documented mock charts and values
mappings.test: apps/demo/src/__tests__/analytics-dashboard.test.tsx::AC2: shows documented mock values and charts for available KPIs

mappings.criterion: SPS, ROAS, and CSAT remain visible, unavailable, non-selectable, and never show fake zero/fixture data
mappings.test: apps/demo/src/__tests__/analytics-dashboard.test.tsx::AC3: keeps SPS, ROAS, and CSAT visible, unavailable, and non-selectable without fake values

mappings.criterion: Available KPI selection performs a literal hero/card swap and updates browser history
mappings.test: apps/demo/src/__tests__/analytics-dashboard.test.tsx::AC4: swaps hero and card selection while updating browser history

mappings.criterion: Range updates hero and available previews transactionally; comparison affects hero only
mappings.test: apps/demo/src/__tests__/analytics-dashboard.test.tsx::AC5: updates hero and previews when range changes and keeps comparison hero-only

mappings.criterion: Provenance, freshness, related Decision deep links, invalid deep links, loading, partial, and error states meet the screen contract
mappings.test: apps/demo/src/__tests__/analytics-dashboard.test.tsx::AC6: exposes provenance, freshness, decision links, and invalid deep links

mappings.criterion: Manual Refresh restores Net Revenue, 30 days, and comparison off
mappings.test: apps/demo/src/__tests__/analytics-dashboard.test.tsx::AC7: Manual Refresh restores Net Revenue, 30 days, and comparison off

mappings.criterion: Charts have accessible text equivalents and responsive/reduced-motion behavior
mappings.test: apps/demo/src/__tests__/analytics-dashboard.test.tsx::AC8: includes responsive layout hooks and reduced-motion safeguards in styles

reviewerSignoff.statement: Intent-review spec_fidelity=pass; 8/8 ACs mapped; analytics tests green. Approve merge for #404.

ownerSignoff.statement: Acknowledged review PASS; six-KPI Analytics demo dashboard verified.
